raw:
{
  "judge_id": "Judge-123",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.2", "R1.4", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.1": 4,
    "R1.2": 4,
    "R1.4": 3,
    "RX.1": 4,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 4,
    "RX.5": 3
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The agent identifies several conceptual issues, including overgeneralized contribution claims and hedging inconsistencies around the mechanism. The suggested reframing is mostly supported.",
    "R1.2": "The agent walks the argument chain end-to-end, flags every load-bearing inconsistency, and proposes minimal repairs. However, some of the proposed fixes are not entirely clear or well-supported.",
    "R1.4": "The agent names one prior work (constrained reinforcement learning robustness) but does not articulate the delta clearly. The novelty assessment is partial.",
    "RX.1": "The agent flags uncertainty for several claims and provides some evidence, but not consistently throughout the output.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed active set J*(d).",
    "RX.4": "The output is harm-free, but with one minor regression (the suggested softening of the contribution claim may not be entirely clear).",
    "RX.5": "Major rewrites are traced, but minor edits are not. The agent could improve on this dimension."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.1": 0.8,
    "R1.2": 0.7,
    "R1.4": 0.6,
    "RX.1": 0.8,
    "RX.3": 1.0,
    "RX.4": 0.9,
    "RX.5": 0.7
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: The agent identifies several conceptual issues, including overgeneralized contribution claims and hedging inconsistencies around the mechanism. The suggested reframing is mostly supported.
rationale.R1.2: The agent walks the argument chain end-to-end, flags every load-bearing inconsistency, and proposes minimal repairs. However, some of the proposed fixes are not entirely clear or well-supported.
rationale.R1.4: The agent names one prior work (constrained reinforcement learning robustness) but does not articulate the delta clearly. The novelty assessment is partial.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags uncertainty for several claims and provides some evidence, but not consistently throughout the output.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed active set J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: The output is harm-free, but with one minor regression (the suggested softening of the contribution claim may not be entirely clear).
rationale.RX.5: Major rewrites are traced, but minor edits are not. The agent could improve on this dimension.
